info.name: Pifon RCP-API
info.description:
JSON:API compliant Recipe API – all endpoints.

Set the `baseUrl` variable to your host (e.g. https://localhost) and run **Login** first to auto-populate the `token` variable.

request.description: Authenticate and obtain a JWT token. The token is automatically saved to the `token` collection variable.
Public API root – returns JSON:API meta with name and version.
Set `parent-id` in attributes to reply to an existing comment.
Create a complete recipe with ingredients and directions in one request.
Import recipe from pifon-recipe v1.0 export format. Always creates new (never updates). Importing user becomes the author.
Export complete recipe as a portable JSON file. Only the recipe author can export.
Deep-clone the recipe. New author is the current user, forkedFrom links to original. Starts as draft.
Full recipe view with general info, ingredients, and directions.
Add a direction step. If product-id is provided, an ingredient is auto-created or accumulated. Prep-time is recalculated. Use 'step' attribute to inject at a specific position.
Removes the direction, renumbers remaining steps, and recalculates prep-time.
Find recipes you can cook from current pantry inventory. Each recipe includes meta with total-ingredients, matched, and missing counts.
